$ A C D E F G H I M N O P R S T V 

E

EQ_PREFIX1 - Static variable in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.EquationSystem
The output will look like "EquationSystem.EQ_PREFIX1#i# EquationSystem.EQ_PREFIX2" where #i# is the index of an equation.
EQ_PREFIX2 - Static variable in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.EquationSystem
If EquationSystem.EQ_PREFIX2 is null then the output of the index will also be omitted.
EQ_SEPARATOR - Static variable in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.EquationSystem
The separator is used to separate the equations of this system.
equals(TermAtom) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom.TermAtom
 
equals(Object) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.Hedge
 
equals(Object) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.TermNode
 
Equation - Interface in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data
Interface for equations which consist of two TermNodes.
EquationSystem<T extends Equation> - Class in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data
A system of Equations
EquationSystem() - Constructor for class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.EquationSystem
 
exec(TermAtom, Hedge) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.TermNode.TraverseCallBack
Propagation will stop as soon as this method returns true.
